response.global_analysis: The video segment contains promotional voiceovers for the Hololive Official Fan Club and the re-release of 'Holo-End-of-Year/New-Year 2023 Date Voices'. I transcribed the spoken dialogue, which heavily relies on on-screen text bubbles for the 'Date Voice' segments. Timing is strictly tied to the audio vocalizations. English translations are contextually aware, preserving character-specific nuances and tone.

subtitles.original: ホロライブファンクラブ！
subtitles.english: Hololive Fan Club!

subtitles.original: 一条莉々華だよ！
subtitles.english: It's Ichijo Ririka!

subtitles.original: I'm Mori Calliope.
subtitles.english: I'm Mori Calliope.

subtitles.original: ホロライブファンクラブ、始めました！
subtitles.english: Hololive Fan Club has begun!

subtitles.original: ここだけのオリジナルグッズや、
subtitles.english: Exclusive original goods, and...

subtitles.original: チケット先行抽選。
subtitles.english: ...early ticket lotteries.

subtitles.original: 他にも楽しいコンテンツがいっぱい！
subtitles.english: Lots of other fun content too!

subtitles.original: Campaigns too? That sounds really fun. I'm curious.
subtitles.english: Campaigns too? That sounds really fun. I'm curious.

subtitles.original: さあ、みんな！ ホロライブファンクラブで一緒に楽しもう！
subtitles.english: Come on everyone! Let's have fun together!

subtitles.original: Join us now!
subtitles.english: Join us now!

subtitles.original: ここは露天風呂が有名だって言うから、ずっと気になってたんだよね～！
subtitles.english: I've always been curious about the open-air baths here!

subtitles.original: …ね、キミも一緒に行かない？
subtitles.english: ...Hey, won't you come with me?

subtitles.original: えっ！？ 一緒に入るって意味じゃないよ！？
subtitles.english: Eh!? I don't mean entering together!?

subtitles.original: おーそーじ！ モココ、大掃除をやってみたいんだよね！
subtitles.english: Cle-an-ing! Mococo wants to try the big cleanup!

subtitles.original: もちろんキミも一緒にやるんだよ！？
subtitles.english: Of course you're doing it too!?

subtitles.original: じゃあ、さっそく大掃除開始だー！
subtitles.english: Well then, let's start the big cleanup right away!

subtitles.original: え～？ 服のすきまがどうしたって～？
subtitles.english: Eh~? What was that about the gap in your clothes~?

subtitles.original: 僕が掃除してる間に、
subtitles.english: While I was cleaning, I wonder...

subtitles.original: キミはいったいどこを見てたのかな～？
subtitles.english: ...exactly where you were looking~?

subtitles.original: お～！ ここが夢にまで見た、日本の温泉街～♪
subtitles.english: Oh~! This is the Japanese hot spring town of my dreams~♪

subtitles.original: ん？ もしかして……
subtitles.english: Hm? Could it be...

subtitles.original: 私と一緒に入りたいなとか、思ってる？
subtitles.english: ...you're thinking you want to get in with me?

subtitles.original: ……いいよ、一緒に入ろっか……？
subtitles.english: ...It's okay, shall we get in together...?

subtitles.original: …って、やばいやばい！ みんな、そろそろカウントダウン始まるよ！
subtitles.english: ...Wait, oh no! Everyone, the countdown is starting!

subtitles.original: Happy New Year!
subtitles.english: Happy New Year!

subtitles.original: あけましておめでとうございます！
subtitles.english: Happy New Year!...

subtitles.original: 今年もよろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: ...Please treat me well this year too!

subtitles.original: えへへ…… なんかあらためてかしこまると、はずかしくて照れちゃうね♪
subtitles.english: Ehehe... Being so formal is a bit embarrassing♪

subtitles.original: ダイヤモンド富士っていうんだっけ？ ほらほら！
subtitles.english: Is it called Diamond Fuji? Look, look!...

subtitles.original: だんだん富士山の輪郭が見えてきたよ！
subtitles.english: ...The outline of Mt. Fuji is becoming visible!

subtitles.original: なんだかもう、この景色だけで感動するよ～！
subtitles.english: Somehow, just this scenery alone is moving~!

subtitles.original: 突然ですが、おせちを作りまーす！ つまみぐいしちゃだめだよ？
subtitles.english: I'm going to make osechi! No snacking, okay?

subtitles.original: もしつまみぐいしちゃったら……ガブってしちゃうからねっ！？
subtitles.english: If you sneak a bite... I'll take a big chomp!

subtitles.original: おめでとー！ おめでとー！
subtitles.english: Happy New Year! Happy New Year!...

subtitles.original: キミとぎゅーしながらお祝い♪
subtitles.english: ...Celebrating while hugging you♪

subtitles.original: キミをぎゅーできるのはモココだけなんだから！
subtitles.english: Only Mococo can hug you!

subtitles.original: ほらほらキミも、モココのことぎゅーっとして！
subtitles.english: Come on, you hug Mococo too!

subtitles.original: せーの！ 今年もよろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: One, two! Please treat us well this year too!
